text.title: QA Release Candidate Smoke Pack Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Pack grew to 47 steps; takes 30 min; humans skip half.
antipattern.fix: Trim to ≤10 steps covering the critical paths; move the rest to the full regression suite.

antipattern.symptom: Production incident: payment broken for 2h after promotion; smoke didn't include /pay.
antipattern.fix: Add payment to the pack; block future RCs without payment in critical_paths_covered.

antipattern.symptom: Smoke FAILED but promotion went ahead because 'looked unrelated'.
antipattern.fix: Add waiver_policy with a named approver; require recorded reason.
